queries.sql: SELECT c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone, a.city, c.created_at FROM clients c LEFT JOIN addresses a ON c.address_id = a.id ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT 10
queries.description: Liste des 10 clients les plus récemment ajoutés

queries.sql: SELECT c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone, a.street_number || ' ' || a.street_name || ', ' || a.zip_code || ' ' || a.city AS address FROM clients c JOIN addresses a ON c.address_id = a.id WHERE a.city ILIKE '%[CITY]%' ORDER BY c.lastname, c.firstname
queries.description: Liste des clients habitant dans une ville spécifique

queries.sql: SELECT c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone, a.street_number || ' ' || a.street_name || ', ' || a.zip_code || ' ' || a.city AS address, c.created_at FROM clients c LEFT JOIN addresses a ON c.address_id = a.id WHERE (c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname) ILIKE '%[CLIENT]%' OR c.email ILIKE '%[CLIENT]%' OR c.id::text = '[CLIENT]'

parameters.name: CLIENT
parameters.description: Nom, email ou ID du client

queries.sql: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.start_date, p.end_date, rs.name AS status FROM projects p JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_status rs ON p.status = rs.id WHERE (c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname) ILIKE '%[CLIENT]%' OR c.email ILIKE '%[CLIENT]%' OR c.id::text = '[CLIENT]' ORDER BY p.start_date DESC
queries.description: Liste de tous les projets associés à un client spécifique

parameters.name: CLIENT
parameters.description: Nom, email ou ID du client

queries.sql: SELECT i.id, i.reference, i.issue_date, i.due_date, i.total_ht, i.total_ttc, rs.name AS status, p.name AS project_name FROM invoices i JOIN projects p ON i.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_status rs ON i.status = rs.id WHERE (c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname) ILIKE '%[CLIENT]%' OR c.email ILIKE '%[CLIENT]%' OR c.id::text = '[CLIENT]' ORDER BY i.issue_date DESC
queries.description: Liste de toutes les factures associées à un client spécifique

parameters.name: CLIENT
parameters.description: Nom, email ou ID du client

questions: Quels clients ont des projets en cours ?
Liste des clients ayant des projets actifs
queries.sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone, COUNT(p.id) AS active_projects FROM clients c JOIN projects p ON c.id = p.client_id JOIN ref_status rs ON p.status = rs.id WHERE rs.code = 'en_cours' AND rs.entity_type = 'project' GROUP BY c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone ORDER BY COUNT(p.id) DESC
queries.description: Liste des clients ayant au moins un projet actif, avec le nombre de projets actifs

questions: Quels clients n'ont pas de projets ?
queries.sql: SELECT c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone, c.created_at FROM clients c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.client_id = c.id) ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
queries.description: Liste des clients qui n'ont aucun projet associé

questions: Quels clients ont des factures impayées ?
Liste des clients avec des factures en attente
Clients ayant des paiements en retard
queries.sql: SELECT c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone, COUNT(i.id) AS unpaid_invoices, SUM(i.total_ttc) AS total_amount_due FROM clients c JOIN projects p ON c.id = p.client_id JOIN invoices i ON p.id = i.project_id JOIN ref_status rs ON i.status = rs.id WHERE rs.code IN ('brouillon', 'envoyée', 'payée_partiellement', 'en_retard') AND rs.entity_type = 'invoice' GROUP BY c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone ORDER BY SUM(i.total_ttc) DESC
queries.description: Liste des clients ayant des factures non payées, avec le montant total dû

questions: Quels sont les clients avec le plus grand chiffre d'affaires ?
Meilleurs clients en termes de facturation
queries.sql: SELECT c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone, COUNT(i.id) AS total_invoices, SUM(i.total_ht) AS total_revenue FROM clients c JOIN projects p ON c.id = p.client_id JOIN invoices i ON p.id = i.project_id JOIN ref_status rs ON i.status = rs.id WHERE rs.entity_type = 'invoice' AND rs.code != 'annulée' GROUP BY c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone ORDER BY SUM(i.total_ht) DESC LIMIT 10
queries.description: Top 10 des clients générant le plus de chiffre d'affaires

questions: Liste des clients fidèles avec plusieurs projets
queries.sql: SELECT c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone, COUNT(p.id) AS project_count FROM clients c JOIN projects p ON c.id = p.client_id GROUP BY c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone HAVING COUNT(p.id) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(p.id) DESC
queries.description: Liste des clients ayant plus d'un projet, triés par nombre de projets décroissant

queries.sql: SELECT c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone, c.created_at FROM clients c WHERE c.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - ('[PERIOD]'::INTERVAL) ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
queries.description: Liste des clients créés sur une période spécifique

questions: Information de contact de la clientèle
queries.sql: SELECT c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone, a.street_number || ' ' || a.street_name || ', ' || a.zip_code || ' ' || a.city AS address FROM clients c LEFT JOIN addresses a ON c.address_id = a.id ORDER BY c.lastname, c.firstname
queries.description: Coordonnées complètes de tous les clients

questions: Clients et leurs habitudes de paiement
queries.sql: SELECT c.id, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, COUNT(i.id) AS total_invoices, COUNT(CASE WHEN rs.code = 'payée' THEN 1 END) AS paid_invoices, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN pay.payment_date IS NOT NULL THEN pay.payment_date - i.issue_date END)) AS average_payment_delay_days FROM clients c JOIN projects p ON c.id = p.client_id JOIN invoices i ON p.id = i.project_id LEFT JOIN payments pay ON i.id = pay.invoice_id JOIN ref_status rs ON i.status = rs.id WHERE rs.entity_type = 'invoice' AND i.issue_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year' GROUP BY c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname ORDER BY c.lastname, c.firstname

questions: Quels clients ont le plus de projets en cours ?
Quels clients ont le plus de chantiers ouverts ?
Classement des clients par nombre de projets actifs
Top clients avec projets en cours
Clients gérant le plus de projets actuellement
Clients les plus actifs par nombre de chantiers
Top 10 des clients avec projets en cours
queries.sql: SELECT c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone, COUNT(p.id) AS active_projects FROM clients c JOIN projects p ON c.id = p.client_id JOIN ref_status rs ON p.status = rs.id WHERE rs.code = 'en_cours' GROUP BY c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone ORDER BY active_projects DESC LIMIT 10
queries.description: Liste des clients ayant le plus de projets en cours

questions: Quels clients n'ont jamais payé une facture ?
Liste des clients à risque financier
Qui n'a jamais payé de facture ?
Liste des clients n'ayant effectué aucun paiement
Clients avec factures mais sans paiement
queries.sql: SELECT c.id, c.firstname, c.lastname, c.email, c.phone FROM clients c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM invoices i JOIN projects p ON i.project_id = p.id JOIN ref_status rs ON i.status = rs.id WHERE p.client_id = c.id AND rs.code = 'payée') ORDER BY c.lastname, c.firstname
queries.description: Liste des clients qui n'ont aucune facture payée

queries.sql: SELECT p.payment_date, p.amount, i.reference AS invoice_ref, i.total_ttc, rs.name AS invoice_status FROM payments p JOIN invoices i ON p.invoice_id = i.id JOIN projects pr ON i.project_id = pr.id JOIN clients c ON pr.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_status rs ON i.status = rs.id WHERE (c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname) ILIKE '%[CLIENT]%' OR c.email ILIKE '%[CLIENT]%' OR c.id::text = '[CLIENT]' ORDER BY p.payment_date DESC
queries.description: Liste des paiements effectués par un client spécifique

parameters.name: CLIENT
parameters.description: Nom, email ou ID du client
